name: Tender win rate
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Share of submitted bids that are awarded.

name: Project gross margin
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Profitability per project against contract value.
formula: (Certified revenue - project cost to date) / certified revenue x 100

name: Work-in-progress value
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
formula: Project cost to date - cost of certified work

name: Certified vs invoiced
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Billing lag between certified work and invoices raised.

name: Retention receivable
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Amounts withheld by clients pending defects liability.
formula: Sum of retention withheld not yet released

name: Debtor days (certified receivables)
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Average days to collect certified amounts.
formula: (Receivables / certified revenue) x days in period

name: Labour cost ratio
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Site labour cost as a share of project cost.
formula: Site labour cost / total project cost x 100

name: Plant and equipment utilisation
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Use of owned plant against available time.
